reference: May I just begin with asking you what brought you in here today? Sure, um, I've been experiencing some issues breathing, um and just a lot of coughing over the past year or so. OK. And is your cough, has it been a wet cough or a dry cough? Uh, but it's been a wet cough. OK. You mentioned it started over a year? Well, about, about 8 months. 8 months. And has it been getting worse at all? Yeah, I think it's been getting worse. OK. And so it's been a wet cough. Do you release any kind of like phlegm or sputum? Um, yeah, it's usually clear, but sometimes it can look yellow or green. OK, and how, how much would you say you produce every day? Um, like um, in total per day? Or just maybe every time you cough. Every time I cough maybe like the size of my thumbprint. OK, and have you notice at all coughing up any blood? No. Is the blood ever mixed into the phlegm? No. OK. And uh, has it been constant coughing? Or does it come and go over the last eight months? Um, it comes and goes, but there, there it's always like I have a tickle in my throat or something. OK, and when it first started, had anything changed in your life? Uh, had you move to a new place or started smoking or anything like that? No. No. OK. Is there anything you do that makes the coughing or shortness of breath worse? Um, I guess walking. Walking? Is there anything that makes it better at all? Just resting. Just resting, OK. How much can you walk or run until you feel the coughing or shortness of breath? About like 200 meters. OK. And has this ever happened to you before the eight months? No. Actually, I get wheezy because I have asthma, but it doesn't, it's not as bad as this. OK. And, um how often are you coughing, are you coughing throughout the day? Or is it more so during the day and then or more at night? Uh, it's just kind of always there, um throughout the day. OK. And do you have any other symptoms besides the difficulty breathing and the cough? Do you have a sore throat, runny nose, dizziness, anything like that? No. OK, so just the difficulty breathing and the cough? Yeah. Do you get any chest pain at all? No chest pain. Great, have you traveled anywhere outside of the country recently? Uh, no, no. Any headaches, nausea or vomiting? No. Any fever, chills or night sweats? No. Do you feel increasingly fatigued throughout the day? Yeah, I guess coughing a lot makes me tired. OK, do you ever feel that your heart is racing or you have any kind of chest pain? No. Have you noticed any issues urinating? No. Any changes in your bowel movements, any constipation or diarrhea? No. Any issues with your sleep or appetite? Uh, no. Any significant changes in your weight? No. Have you had any recent infections that you know of? Not that I know of. Any antibiotics that you've had to use for any infections? No. Um, do you think you have had any exposure to tuberculosis in the past? No. And do you have exposure to fumes or dust or animals or pets in your work or home environment? I have a bird. A bird? And when did you get the bird? Like five years ago. OK, but no issues before the eight months? No. OK. In terms of your overall health, do you have any past medical conditions? You mentioned asthma, but anything else like diabetes, high blood pressure? I have type 2 diabetes and high blood pressure. OK. And or do you take any medications for those conditions? No, it's just being controlled by diet. OK, any medications for any other reasons? I take some vitamin D tablets. OK, any allergies, environmental or to medications? No. OK, have you ever been hospitalized? No. Any ill contacts near you at home or work? No. Any previous surgeries? No previous surgeries. OK, do you have any family history of asthma or any other lung condition or any cancers? No lung conditions or cancers. OK. And currently, do you work? I do. And where do you work? I work as an accountant. OK. And do you currently live in an apartment or a house? In an apartment. OK. And do you live by yourself or do you live with anyone else? Just by myself. OK. Any new changes to your house uhm, any new carpets or anything like that? Or have you moved into a new new place recently? No. OK, do you use any recreational drugs like marijuana? No, I smoked when I was younger, but not anymore. OK, and do you smoke cigarettes? I do. OK, and how much would you say you smoke on an average day? Uhm, about half a pack a day. OK, and how long have you been smoking for? Since I was 18. OK. And you drink alcohol? Uhm, sometimes. And how often would you say on an average week, how many drinks of alcohol would you say you have? Uhm, maybe 2 glasses of wine a week. OK. And in terms of your diet and exercise, would you say you get 3 meals a day? Well balance, well balanced diet? Um, yeah, I'd say so. OK, and lastly, in terms of exercise, would you say you're fairly active throughout the week? Uhm, yep. And what kind of things do you do for activity? Um, I take walks when I can. Um, before this whole shortness of breath thing, I used to ride my bike. OK.
